name: DERMATOPATHIC LYMPHADENOPATHY
definition: benign reactive lymphadenopathy within breast associated with cutaneous rashes

demographics.Histo: follicular pattern retained, germinal centers enlarged, enlarged paracortical area with

dominant_finding: regional subcentimeter masses with central / peripheral radiolucent notches
discriminating_features: regional subcentimeter masses with central / peripheral radiolucent notches

general: regional subcentimeter masses with central / peripheral radiolucent notches
